name: axiom
description: Battle-tested skills for modern iOS development — SwiftUI, concurrency, data, performance, networking, accessibility, and more.

interface.longDescription: Axiom gives AI coding assistants deep iOS development expertise — preventing data loss from bad migrations, catching memory leaks, diagnosing build failures, and guiding Swift concurrency, SwiftUI, networking, accessibility, and more.
defaultPrompt: Check my SwiftUI code for performance issues
Help me fix this build failure
How do I safely add a database column?
